site.title: Outbound-Growth — Outbound SDR-as-a-Service for US & UK SaaS
site.description: Dedicated South African SDR teams for SaaS companies in the US and UK. Fully managed outbound: research, calls, email, LinkedIn, meetings on your calendar.

hero.headline: Outbound SDR Teams That Build Pipeline for Your SaaS Company
hero.subheadline: We provide dedicated South African SDR teams that generate qualified meetings with your ideal customers.
bullets: Meetings booked directly into your calendar

solution.label: Our solution
solution.title: SDR-as-a-Service, fully managed
solution.subtitle: One partner owns prospecting end to end. You get pipeline without hiring, training, or day-to-day SDR management.

points.title: Dedicated SDRs
points.description: Reps focused on your accounts, your tone, and your booking link—not a shared pool with divided attention.

points.title: Outreach infrastructure
points.description: Dialer, email sequences, and LinkedIn workflows set up and maintained around your compliance and brand.

points.title: Prospecting strategy
points.description: ICP definition, list building, and message testing aligned to who actually buys your product.

points.title: Campaign management
points.description: Daily execution, follow-up discipline, and iteration on what is working—not one-off blasts.

points.title: Reporting and optimization
points.description: Clear activity and outcome visibility so you can see volume, responses, and meetings booked.

process.label: How it works
process.title: From ICP to meetings on your calendar
process.subtitle: A straightforward five-step model—so you always know what happens next.

steps.title: Define your ideal customer profile
steps.description: We align on firmographics, roles, triggers, and disqualifiers so every touch targets real buyers.

steps.title: Build a target account list
steps.description: Research and list building so your team works the right companies—not the easiest CSV download.

steps.title: Launch multi-channel outreach
steps.description: Coordinated cold calling, email, and LinkedIn based on what fits your market and motion.

steps.title: Qualify interested prospects
steps.description: Conversations and replies are qualified against your criteria before anyone gets your AE’s time.

steps.title: Book meetings directly into your calendar
steps.description: Qualified discovery calls land on your schedule. Your job is to run a great call and close.

services.label: What we run
services.title: Outbound activities we handle
services.subtitle: Everything before the demo: research, outreach, qualification, and handoff—inside your stack where you want it.
activities: CRM integration (HubSpot, Salesforce, and common stacks)
services.closingLine: Software, management, and HR sit with us—you get a managed seat and a clear view of activity and meetings.

whySouthAfrica.label: Why South African SDRs
whySouthAfrica.title: English-first talent at a sustainable cost
whySouthAfrica.subtitle: South Africa is a strong fit for US and UK SaaS outbound: communication quality, timezone overlap, and motivation—without San Francisco or London payroll.

points.title: Native-level English
points.description: Clear, professional communication on calls and in writing—what your prospects expect from a serious vendor.

points.title: Strong sales culture
points.description: A deep bench of reps used to B2B outreach, coaching, and metric-driven work.

points.title: US and UK timezone overlap
points.description: Coverage that lines up with when your buyers are at their desks—without asking your team to work graveyard shifts.

points.title: Lower cost than local hire
points.description: Meaningful savings versus building the same capacity in the US or UK—while keeping quality and oversight high.

points.title: Motivated, dedicated teams
points.description: Reps who treat your pipeline as their job—because it is.

idealClients.label: Who we work with
idealClients.title: Built for B2B SaaS in the US and UK
idealClients.subtitle: We do our best work with teams that sell a defined product to a defined buyer—and need consistent meetings, not ad-hoc campaigns.
idealClients.companyProfile: Seed to Series B, early-growth SaaS, and any team that needs pipeline without building an internal SDR org.

outcomes.label: What to expect
outcomes.title: Outcomes that match how outbound actually works
outcomes.subtitle: We do not promise magic numbers. We promise a managed function aimed at qualified conversations and a fuller top of funnel.

items.title: More qualified meetings
items.description: Steady effort against your ICP—so sales sees conversations with buyers who fit, not random fills.

items.title: Consistent outbound pipeline
items.description: Activity and sourcing that does not stop when your team is on a release cycle or at a conference.

items.title: Predictable lead generation rhythm
items.description: Defined touchpoints and reporting so you know what ran, what landed, and what to tweak.

items.title: Faster expansion into new segments
items.description: A team that can test verticals or geos with structured outreach while you keep closing core deals.

finalCta.title: Ready to build a predictable outbound pipeline?
finalCta.subtitle: Book a discovery call with our team. We will walk through your ICP, motion, and whether SDR-as-a-Service is the right fit.

testimonials.quote: Outbound-Growth gave us a reliable outbound rhythm. Their SDRs sounded like part of our team and kept our AE calendar busy with real conversations.
testimonials.author: Client partner
testimonials.title: VP Sales, B2B SaaS

testimonials.quote: We did not want to hire and train SDRs in London. The South Africa team integrated into HubSpot and Slack quickly; reporting was straightforward.
testimonials.author: Client partner
testimonials.title: Head of Growth, SaaS
